{{Infobox technique
| name = Makiel's Presence
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Makiel's Presence]] greeted [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] can manifest his [[Presence]] to deliver orders.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]]’s [[Presence]] is a floating purple eye.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
